data.title: DSV A/S reports Q3 results
data.description:
• DSV A/S press release (OTCPK:DSDVF): Q3 gross profit improved by 4.8% and EBIT before special items was 1.5% higher compared to the same period last year.
  • Adjusted free cash flow generation in Q3 2024 improved to DKK 2,524 million.
  • Outlook for 2024
  • EBIT before special items is expected to be in the range of DKK 16,000-17,000 million (previously DKK 15,500-17,000 million).
  • The effective tax rate is expected to be approximately 24%.
  • One-off costs (special items) are expected to be in the level of DKK 650 million in 2024.

data.title: Black Mammoth Metals to raise ~$3.2M via private placement
data.description:
• Black Mammoth Metals (TSXV:BMM:CA) is seeking to raise gross proceeds of up to $3.22M by way of a private placement of up to 4.6M shares at a price of $0.70 per unit.
  • Each unit consists of one common share and one-half common share purchase warrant at an exercise price of $1.10.
  • Proceeds to be used for its exploration properties, its America Mine property, its non-core exploration interests, general working capital and for potential acquisitions.

data.title: Zijin Mining Group reports 9M results
data.description:
• Zijin Mining Group press release (OTCPK:ZIJMF): 9M Revenue reached RMB 230.4 billion.
  • Net profit attributable to the parent company of RMB 24.4 billion from Q1 to Q3 2024, reflecting a 51% increase year-over-year.
  • The debt ratio saw a decline of 4.28 percentage points from the beginning of the year.
  • Mining operations posted a gross profit margin of 57.7%, up 7.4 percentage points year-over-year, while the overall gross margin reached 19.5%, an increase of 4.4 percentage points.

data.title: Svenska Handelsbanken AB reports Q3 results
data.description:
• Svenska Handelsbanken AB press release (OTCPK:SVNLF): Q3 Earnings per share grew to SEK 3.64 
  • Operating profit increased to SEK 9,061.
  • The common equity tier 1 ratio was 18.8%.

data.title: Upwork surges after workforce reduction, preliminary Q3 results announcement
data.description:
Upwork (NASDAQ:UPWK) jumped after the work marketplace announced a workforce reduction to reduce costs and preliminary Q3 results that exceed the top end of guidance.

UPWK shares were trading +16.42% Wednesday pre-market.

The company said it intends to streamline the organizational structure, with the changes including a 21% reduction in the total workforce.

The announced changes are expected to generate ~$60M in annualized cost savings.

Additionally, Upwork now expects Q3 revenue of $194M, compared to the original guidance of $179M to $184M and $182.12M consensus.

Q3 net income is now expected to come at $28M and adjusted EBITDA is estimated to be $43M, compared to the previous guidance of $36M to $39M.

The company said it has delivered on margin expansion and continues the march toward its 5-year profitability target of 35% adjusted EBITDA margin.

The company is set to announce its Q3 financial results on Wednesday, November 6, after market close.

Source: Press Release

data.title: Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance gets $50M loan to fund new investments
data.description:
• Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance (NASDAQ:REFI) entered into a $50M unsecured term loan from two institutional private lending platforms to fund the company’s future investments and other general corporate purposes.

  • The unsecured term loan matures in October 2028, is interest only and bears a fixed cash interest rate of 9.0%.

  • The company can prepay the term loan in whole or in part at any time and from time to time subject to applicable prepayment penalties.

data.title: Magnite shares soar after bagging two-year extension from Disney for ad services
Swedbank AB EPS of SEK3.64
data.description:
• Swedbank AB press release (OTCPK:SWDBF): Q3 EPS of SEK3.64.
  • Operating profit increased to SEK 9,061m
  • Return on equity increased to 15.6%
  • The common equity tier 1 ratio was 18.8%.

data.title: Assa Abloy EPS of SEK 3.63, revenue of SEK 37.42B
data.description:
• Assa Abloy press release (OTCPK:ASAZF): Q3 EPS of SEK 3.63.
  • Revenue of SEK 37.42B
  • It is estimated that completed acquisitions and divestments, on a rolling 12-month basis as of September 30, 2024, will have an effect of 5% on sales in thefourth quarter of 2024 versus the same period last year, while the effect on theoperating margin is estimated to be neutral in the fourth quarter of 2024.

data.title: Calidi Biotherapeutics stock tumbles on $2M securities offering
data.description:
• Calidi Biotherapeutics (NYSE:CLDI) shares fell over 10% Wednesday morning after the company priced an offering of 2.05M common shares at $1.00 per share.

  • The clinical-stage biotechnology company also entered into a concurrent private placement to issue series E warrants to purchase up to 2.05M common shares and series F warrants to purchase up to 2.05M common shares.

  • The series E warrants have an exercise price of $1.13 per share, while the series F warrants are exercisable at $1.13 per share.

  • The gross proceeds from the offerings are expected to be approximately $2M.

  • Calidi (CLDI) intends to use the net proceeds for working capital, general corporate purposes and pre-clinical and clinical trials.

  • Shares of the biotech firm were down more than 10% in premarket trading on Wednesday.
